user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty, traditional breakfast featuring scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, golden hash browns, and toasted whole-grain bread.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk two large eggs with a splash of milk and scramble in a lightly buttered pan until fluffy. Serve alongside two strips of crispy turkey or pork bacon and a side of shredded potato hash browns browned in olive oil. Accompany with a slice of toasted whole-grain bread and a small side of fresh orange slices.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs and bacon; complex carbohydrates from whole-grain toast and potatoes offer sustained energy. Vitamin C from the orange side aids in iron absorption. A classic high-satiety start to the day.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user specifically requested a 'classic american breakfast' for the father's 'greek food filled day' (Day 1). Position -1 appends it as a familiar alternative to the existing Mediterranean-style options on that specific day.
